Globe Clotrimazole Antifungal Cream 1% USP (1 oz), Anti Fungal Treatment, Relieves Itching, Burning, Cracking and Scalin

ai_diagnosis.summary: Competitor landscape is split between organic-heavy incumbents (Globe ASINs with 80%+ natural coverage and low ad reliance) and aggressive ad scalers (SimplyVital and CHARMPOO with ~46-49% ad keyword coverage). No own product metrics were provided, so CPC bid-level decisions cannot be made reliably; current priority should be building coverage around high-intent antifungal condition and ingredient terms while using ads to accelerate organic rank.
keyword_opportunities: jock itch cream / jock itch treatment
athlete's foot cream / foot fungus treatment
ringworm treatment cream / antifungal skin cream
ad_strategy: Build separate Sponsored Products manual campaigns by intent cluster: ingredient terms, condition terms, symptom terms, and competitor ASIN/product targeting.
Use exact match for high-intent core terms and phrase/broad match only for harvesting; move converting search terms into exact campaigns after validation.
Launch product targeting against organic-heavy Globe ASINs and ad-heavy SimplyVital/CHARMPOO ASINs to capture competitor comparison traffic.

Test Sponsored Brands Video for education-heavy terms such as jock itch, athlete's foot, ringworm, itching, burning, and fast-absorbing antifungal cream, since CHARMPOO is already using video traffic.
organic_growth: Align title, bullets, backend search terms, and A+ content around the main condition and ingredient clusters: clotrimazole, miconazole, jock itch, athlete's foot, ringworm, itching, burning, cracking, and scaling.
Use SP exact campaigns to drive conversions on 5-10 priority keywords, then maintain spend until organic rank improves and TACOS stabilizes.
Improve conversion rate before scaling bids: strengthen main image, dosage/ingredient clarity, use-case badges, comparison chart, and review generation.
Monitor keyword rank weekly and shift budget from broad discovery into exact campaigns where ad conversions begin lifting organic placement.
alerts: SimplyVital is the most aggressive advertiser with 378 ad keywords and 55 campaigns, creating high CPC pressure across core antifungal terms.
CHARMPOO has a diversified ad mix including SP, video, and brand ads, indicating a stronger upper-funnel and branded defense strategy.
Globe ASINs rely heavily on organic and recommendation traffic, making them difficult to displace without sustained conversion-driven ranking campaigns.
Own product metrics are missing, so spend, CTR, CPC, CVR, and ACOS optimization cannot be diagnosed; ad search term and campaign data should be added before bid changes.
